title: Brazil’s Pix becomes a trade flashpoint with the US, and the world is watching
summary: Analysts at the Atlantic Council have warned that treating a domestic payment system as a trade barrier sets a precedent that could touch Europe’s plans for a digital euro and other central bank digital currencies .
